title: Settings
subtitle: Account and preferences

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Hot leads send immediately. Reminders are batched on the server to reduce noise.
push.digest_window: Digest window: {{minutes}} min (server-side; contact support to tune).

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used throughout the app.

sign_out_confirm_body: You'll be returned to the login screen.

delete_account.row_hint: Permanently remove your account and data.
delete_account.headline: Are you sure?
delete_account.body: Deleting your account permanently removes your profile, leads, conversations, tasks, and notification tokens. This cannot be undone.
delete_account.retention_note: Billing records and de-identified usage data may be retained as described in the Privacy Policy.
delete_account.error_generic: Could not delete your account. Please try again or contact support.
